description_long: This is a muscular adult male figure with a bald head and prominent tattoos covering his left shoulder, upper arm, and part of his chest and back. He is wearing fitted athletic trunks with a graphic design on the front and a large bull emblem on the back, as well as knee-high wrestling boots and knee supports. The figure's physique is highly defined, with visible musculature in the arms, chest, and legs. His posture is relaxed but upright, with arms hanging naturally at his sides. The skin tone is naturalistic, and the surface details include realistic anatomical features and body art. The overall appearance suggests a professional wrestler or athlete prepared for competition.
description: A muscular, tattooed adult male in athletic trunks and wrestling boots, with a bald head and detailed body art. The figure has a highly defined physique and a relaxed, upright stance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muscular chest, abdominal definition, and detailed tattoos on the left shoulder and chest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full extent of the arm and shoulder tattoos, as well as the profile of the boots and knee supports.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large bull emblem on the trunks, muscular back, and tattoos extending onto the upper back.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the clean, untattooed right arm and the side profile of the boots and knee supports.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic trunks and knee-high wrestling boots with knee supports
